title: valeriana officinalis var. altissima
intro: Valeriana officinalis var. altissima, also known as tall valerian, is a variety of the valerian plant (Valeriana officinalis) that belongs to the valerian family (Valerianaceae). It is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia, known for its medicinal properties, particularly its sedative and anxiolytic effects, which are attributed to the presence of valerenic acid and valepotriates. The health benefits of valeriana officinalis var. altissima include relief from insomnia, anxiety, restlessness, and stress, making it a popular herbal remedy for promoting relaxation and improving sleep quality. Valeriana officinalis var. altissima can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
